projects.title: UT Marketplace
projects.description: Web3 marketplace for selling UNIQs (NFTs) on the Ultra blockchain.
projects.longDescription: UT Marketplace is a Web3 marketplace dedicated to selling UNIQs (NFTs) on the Ultra blockchain. It features an advanced marketplace section as well as dedicated spaces for collections, transactions and statistics to track sales performance. The application is connected to the Ultra blockchain with wallet integration and transaction processing. A multilingual system is included. MVP developed as part of a fundraising round in collaboration with Ultra Times.
challenges: Ultra wallet integration and transaction reliability
solutions: Ultra Wallet SDK/extension usage and error state management
Clear data schema and reusable components

projects.title: HR Request V2
projects.description: New HR application to automate and modernize onboarding processes.
projects.longDescription: Complete overhaul of the HR application to simplify and automate tasks related to employee onboarding (regardless of status). Significant gains in productivity and efficiency for the HR team.
features: Automatic management of medical and security checks
solutions: Granular RBAC on API and UI side

projects.title: GPCM V2
projects.description: Migration to NestJS to accelerate and modernize the GPCM app.
projects.longDescription: Backend migration from PHP (CodeIgniter) to Node (NestJS) to boost speed and responsiveness. New features, improved design and new data architecture adapted to business needs (PC maintenance and tickets). QR code access.

projects.title: Ultra Meetup
projects.description: Website listing Ultra / Ultra Times community events.
projects.longDescription: Showcase website to reference meetups and events from the Ultra and Ultra Times community.

projects.title: Table Tennis Match Tracking App
projects.description: Mobile app for tracking ping-pong scores with voice announcements.
projects.longDescription: Mobile app for tracking ping-pong match scores, with tracking system and voice announcements. Project created for a Secret Santa and to improve score management.

projects.title: The Battle of Expressions
projects.description: Fun web game to measure affinity with FR/CA expressions.
projects.longDescription: Web game in 10 rounds with Framer Motion animations, responsive design and shareable results. Created as a Secret Santa gift.

projects.title: Ultra Dashboard
projects.description: Dashboard around the Ultra blockchain and $UOS token.
projects.longDescription: Price tracking, technical indicators, key info and project-related articles. Integration of CEX APIs and Ultra Times website.

projects.title: GPCM - Maintenance Application
projects.description: PC maintenance management with GLPI sync and ticket tracking.
projects.longDescription: Main project in Bachelor at CESI. Remote computer management (ghost/software updates, troubleshooting), bidirectional GLPI sync, improved ticket tracking.

projects.title: Ultra Wallet Tracker
projects.description: Tracking the number of wallets created on the Ultra blockchain.
projects.longDescription: Simple application to track wallet creation on Ultra in real-time.

projects.title: FED - Business Application
projects.description: Digital tracking of emergence forms (accessibility, optimization, maintenance).
projects.longDescription: Tool for tracking digitized emergence forms, with accessibility module, optimizations and maintenance.

projects.title: Flux Tools - Business Application
projects.description: QR code app for bin collection and automated emails.
projects.longDescription: Application for agents responsible for bin collection with QR code and automated emails.

projects.title: Gacha Game
projects.description: Gacha game (cats) with combat and rewards, created in group at CESI.
projects.longDescription: Creation of a cat gacha game with DALL·E for images, combat system and rewards. One week work.

projects.title: Fire Permit - Business Application
projects.description: Fire permit requests for agents, improved security.
projects.longDescription: Fire permit request application with optimizations, maintenance and V2.

projects.title: HR Requests - Business Application
projects.description: HR request management and automated emails.
projects.longDescription: HR app to manage various requests with automated email sending.

projects.title: Secret Santa
projects.description: Secret Santa matching app with blacklist and auto emails.
projects.longDescription: Python/Flask project with HTML5, SCSS and JavaScript. Blacklist management and automated emails.

projects.title: Supplies - Business Application
projects.description: Internal warehouse order and stock management.
projects.longDescription: Internal app for orders and stocks, with pagination, sorting and maintenance.

projects.title: OZC Signage Commercial Website
projects.description: Signage merchant site for individuals and professionals.
projects.longDescription: E-commerce site for signage sales across France.

projects.title: French Sticker Commercial Website
projects.description: E-commerce site for decorative panels.
projects.longDescription: Site for decorative panel sales (B2C).

projects.title: OZC Institutional Website
projects.description: Institutional website highlighting services and activities.
projects.longDescription: Company showcase website with contact conversion focus.

projects.title: OZC Layout Showcase Website
projects.description: Showcase website for layout and construction activity.
projects.longDescription: Presentation of layout services and achievements.

projects.title: Manage Transport Showcase Website
projects.description: Showcase website presenting a carrier's services. Complete Next.js redesign in 2025.
projects.longDescription: Simple site to present services and contact. Second work period in 2025: complete redesign with my Next.js stack (App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind), performance/SEO optimizations, accessibility and UX (May-June 2025).

projects.title: UT Quest
projects.description: Web3 quest MVP to boost the Ultra ecosystem (social and in-game engagement).
projects.longDescription: UT Quest is a Web3 quest project aimed at boosting the Ultra ecosystem and its blockchain by engaging players through social, in-game and more activities. The version developed here is a functional MVP, connected to the blockchain for various actions, including Ultra wallet connection via the Ultra Wallet extension and quest creation for different games. Any authorized person can manage their games and their own quests from an admin dashboard. Project developed as part of a fundraising round.
solutions: RBAC on API and UI side

projects.title: OZC Web
projects.description: Showcase website for Osmoz Communication agency's web/digital services.
projects.longDescription: Showcase website presenting Osmoz Communication agency's web and digital offering. Focus on offer clarity, service highlighting and simple contact journey. Project associated with DigitalLabs TM.
solutions: Clean and effective UI aligned with identity

projects.title: UT Launchpad
projects.description: UNIQ (NFT) launch platform to boost the Ultra blockchain.
projects.longDescription: UT Launchpad was created to generate activity on the Ultra blockchain through UNIQ (NFT) collection launches. The platform aims to become the first launchpad in the Ultra ecosystem and introduces the Phygital concept: an UNIQ can be burned in exchange for its physical equivalent printed on dibond. This MVP was developed as part of Ultra Times' fundraising round.
features: Connection and participation via Ultra Wallet
challenges: Ultra blockchain integration and transaction reliability
solutions: Ultra Wallet SDK/extension with error state management

projects.title: UT Snapshot
projects.description: Snapshot tool to identify UNIQ holders on the Ultra blockchain.
projects.longDescription: UT Snapshot allows taking snapshots of the Ultra network to identify holders of specific UNIQs. The tool provides a clear and up-to-date view of asset distribution, facilitating analysis of ownership patterns and engagement tracking in the Ultra ecosystem. MVP developed as part of Ultra Times' fundraising round.

projects.title: WeNeedU
projects.description: Web3 freelance platform for missions/services in the Ultra ecosystem.
projects.longDescription: WeNeedU is a Web3 freelance platform, inspired by the Fiverr model, dedicated to missions and services within the Ultra blockchain ecosystem. It connects talents with opportunities related to the Ultra platform, affiliated entities, games and projects, allowing creators, developers and professionals to offer their skills for crypto payments. Designed to foster collaboration and accelerate project development, WeNeedU aims to become the reference marketplace for on-demand expertise in the Ultra ecosystem. MVP developed as part of Ultra Times' fundraising round.
challenges: Offer, profile and order flow modeling
Smooth user experience on complex journeys
solutions: Robust status and error management on Web3 side
Structured data schema and reusable components

projects.title: Ashes of Mankind - Empires
projects.description: Web3 game with Ultra blockchain integration for the gaming ecosystem.
projects.longDescription: Development of the Web3 integration layer of Ashes of Mankind (Empires), connecting the game to Ultra blockchain smart contracts (EOS fork) through custom frontend logic. Built the React frontend and NestJS backend, ensuring smooth interaction between the player interface and blockchain components. Collaborated in an Agile environment, participating in sprint planning, technical reviews, and iterative feature development to ensure continuous delivery and quality. Participated in international technical meetings (Canada, Colombia, Japan, etc.), coordinating with global teams to align on technical direction and game design goals. Engaged in game design discussions, helping bridge user experience and blockchain features to create a cohesive gameplay flow.
challenges: Bridge between UX and blockchain features

projects.title: FED V3
projects.description: Internal SNCF platform for infrastructure project tracking.
projects.longDescription: Contributed to the development of FED V3, an internal SNCF platform designed to track the progress of infrastructure projects, covering both financial management and construction execution. Developed and maintained key features using React (frontend) and NestJS/MySQL (backend), ensuring reliable data flow and intuitive project monitoring. Collaborated with design teams in Figma to deliver a clean and efficient user interface aligned with SNCF's internal standards. Operated in an Agile environment, participating in sprints, daily stand-ups, and reviews to ensure continuous delivery and collaboration. Optimized workflows and reduced manual reporting time, saving project teams several hours per week and improving cross-department coordination.

projects.title: Valentin Automatisation
projects.description: Showcase website for an AI automation services company.
projects.longDescription: Developed the showcase website for Valentin Automatisation, a company providing AI automation agent services. Built a modern and responsive frontend to clearly present the company's offerings and enhance its online visibility. Focused on clean UI design, performance, and accessibility for an optimal user experience.
features: Clear presentation of AI automation services

projects.title: CLOAK Website
projects.description: Public website presenting the CLOAK zero-knowledge protocol and ecosystem.
projects.longDescription: Led frontend development of cloak.today, the public-facing website introducing the CLOAK zero-knowledge privacy protocol and its ecosystem. Built a high-quality, responsive marketing website using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, and integrated an AI-powered chatbot to help users explore product capabilities and documentation through natural conversations. Worked closely with product and protocol stakeholders to structure key messaging around privacy, tokenomics, governance, and roadmap while optimizing SEO, performance, and accessibility.
features: AI chatbot integration for user onboarding
Clear content architecture (privacy, tokenomics, governance, roadmap)
challenges: Making zero-knowledge concepts understandable for mixed audiences
Maintaining strong product credibility with simple UX
solutions: Consistent design system focused on clarity
Advanced technical optimizations for performance, SEO, and accessibility

projects.title: CLOAK Web App
projects.description: Privacy-first web application to interact with the CLOAK Shielded Protocol.
projects.longDescription: Led frontend development for the CLOAK Web App, delivering a privacy-first interface for interacting with the CLOAK Shielded Protocol. Built and maintained complex user interfaces enabling private wallets, shielded transactions, and DeFi features including an integrated DEX. Worked closely with protocol and smart contract teams to accurately represent transaction states, privacy guarantees, and zero-knowledge constraints while optimizing performance and responsiveness for Antelope's low-latency environment.
features: Private wallet and shielded interaction flows
Confidential transactions with on-chain state tracking
Simplified user journeys that abstract blockchain complexity
challenges: Representing zero-knowledge constraints accurately in UI
Maintaining trustworthy UX across complex DeFi flows
Ensuring smooth performance for on-chain interactions
solutions: Precise transaction-state modeling and privacy guarantees
Clarity-first UX design to reduce user friction
Targeted frontend optimizations for responsiveness and stability

projects.title: IXS Valuation Simulator
projects.description: Tokenomics simulation tool to model market cap scenarios and protocol-driven value flows.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a tokenomics simulation tool for IXS using Next.js, focused on modeling market cap scenarios and protocol-driven value flows. Implemented dynamic calculations for MC/TVL ratios, implied token price, and portfolio valuation based on customizable assumptions. Built an interactive system to simulate multiple revenue streams (DEX fees, launchpad, SaaS, yield), including automated buyback and burn mechanics. Structured a flexible architecture allowing real-time parameter adjustments and instant financial projections. Focused on performance and UX to deliver a clear, responsive interface for exploring complex economic models.
features: Interactive simulation of market cap scenarios and protocol value flows
Dynamic MC/TVL, implied token price, and portfolio valuation calculations
Multi-stream revenue modeling (DEX fees, launchpad, SaaS, yield)
Real-time parameter tuning with instant projections
challenges: Making complex tokenomics models understandable for decision-making
Keeping projections fast and stable with real-time recalculations
Building a flexible model that supports multiple revenue assumptions
solutions: Optimized calculation engine for instant updates
Clear, high-performance UX for economic model exploration

projects.title: Film Solaire 75
projects.description: SEO-first showcase website for window film services in Paris.
projects.longDescription: Led the design and frontend development of the Film Solaire 75 showcase website, creating a high-conversion platform for a competitive local market in Paris. Built a fast, responsive, SEO-driven website using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Implemented a comprehensive local SEO strategy with semantic page structures, keyword clustering, optimized metadata, advanced internal linking, technical SEO best practices, and continuous monitoring via Google Search Console.
features: Local conversion-focused platform for the Paris market
Local SEO strategy with semantic clustering and structured pages
Strong internal linking between service pages to improve topical authority
Technical SEO optimization (sitemap, robots, canonicals, structured data, CWV)
Conversion-first user journeys with strong CTAs and trust signals
challenges: Ranking on high-intent local keywords in a competitive market
Maintaining performance, UX, and crawlability on SEO-rich content
Turning local organic traffic into qualified leads
solutions: Intent-driven content architecture targeting user pain points
Advanced internal linking system to maximize crawl depth and authority
Continuous iteration through Search Console indexing/performance insights

projects.title: Film Solaire 77
projects.description: Conversion-focused and SEO-optimized showcase website for Seine-et-Marne.
projects.longDescription: Led the design and frontend development of the Film Solaire 77 showcase website, delivering a modern and conversion-focused online presence. Built a responsive, SEO-optimized website using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Implemented robust on-page and technical SEO, strong internal linking, and Google Search Console monitoring to improve visibility and conversion performance.
features: Modern showcase website with conversion-oriented user flows
Complete on-page SEO (semantic structure, keywords, metadata)
Internal linking architecture for crawlability and authority distribution
Technical SEO setup (sitemap, robots, canonicals, Core Web Vitals)
Clear navigation with quote forms and optimized CTAs
challenges: Improving organic visibility on a local competitive scope
Balancing technical performance with SEO depth
Increasing brand trust and conversion through UX and content
solutions: Keyword-driven SEO strategy combined with Search Console iteration
Internal-linking architecture guiding users toward high-conversion pages
Brand-aligned UI emphasizing professionalism and service quality

projects.title: Film Solaire IDF
projects.description: Scalable SEO platform targeting the full Île-de-France region.
projects.longDescription: Led the design and frontend development of the Film Solaire IDF showcase website, building a scalable platform for Île-de-France. Developed a fast, responsive, SEO-first website using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind. Executed a regional SEO strategy combining location-based pages and service clusters, advanced internal linking, large-scale technical SEO, and continuous indexing/performance monitoring in Google Search Console.
features: Scalable SEO platform for full Île-de-France coverage
Geographic structure by departments/cities and service clusters
Advanced internal linking between location, service, and conversion pages
Large-scale technical SEO (dynamic sitemap, robots, canonicals, structured data)
Conversion-first UX with regional CTAs and clear service presentation
challenges: Managing multi-location SEO strategy with large page volume
Maintaining UX/mobile quality while scaling geographic targeting
Ensuring stable indexing and performance across the region
solutions: Modular architecture combining geographic segmentation and user intent
Continuous Search Console monitoring to close indexing/coverage gaps
Performance and accessibility optimizations to maximize mobile conversion
